Distance-3 merge with double selection on the chip geometry, 2 rounds
The distilled lane of thesis Section 4.3.4 on the full cell layout: two halves ferried to the gate-end hold wells during the round, the spent survivor recycled at the read to catch the third, double selection at the boundary. Op order from qec_distill.py. The scheduler's own legality check is shown live on every frame: well capacity, junction columns clear of resting ions, and no passing without a shared-well crystal rotation.
data X check Z check comm Ba held half Yb coolant swap well hold wells junction column · memory homes 2d+1 · strip: junction, well alternating, then holds and swap · SPAM d sites · wall · cavity
